query:
-- Quais bolões têm o jogo id=1?
SELECT p.id as pool_id, p.name as pool_name, p.status, p.tournamentId,
  g.id as game_id, g.scoreA, g.scoreB, g.status as game_status
FROM pools p
JOIN games g ON g.tournamentId = p.tournamentId
WHERE g.id = 1;

-- Todos os palpites no jogo id=1 (de qualquer bolão)
SELECT b.id, b.userId, b.poolId, b.gameId, b.predictedScoreA, b.predictedScoreB, 
  b.resultType, b.pointsEarned, p.name as pool_name, p.status as pool_status
FROM bets b
JOIN pools p ON p.id = b.poolId
WHERE b.gameId = 1;

  g.id as game_id, g.scoreA, g.scoreB, g.status as game_status

JOIN games g ON g.tournamentId = p.tournamentId

-- Todos os palpites no jogo id=1 (de qualquer bolão)
SELECT b.id, b.userId, b.poolId, b.gameId, b.predictedScoreA, b.predictedScoreB, 
  b.resultType, b.pointsEarned, p.name as pool_name, p.status as pool_status
FROM bets b
JOIN pools p ON p.id = b.poolId
